title: VILLAGE OF HOPE MICRO SHELTER - 211info
text: VILLAGE OF HOPE VILLAGE OF HOPE MICRO SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing with access to case management services. Clients must be able to manage their own activities of daily living, including eating, bathing, and mobility. This program operates on a waitlist. Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and pregnant women. One pet per adult is admitted. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 507-4992 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 375-7491 Intake Main phone (503) 507-4992 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete form or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter Transitional Housing/Shelter * Pregnant Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
